'''âs-v-p''' ('''kasavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nesh|nesh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nesh|nesh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisavap|thisavap]] || [[word:jisavap|jisavap]] || [[word:shisavap|shisavap]] || [[word:kisavap|kisavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusavap|thuthusavap]] || [[word:jujusavap|jujusavap]] || [[word:shushusavap|shushusavap]] || [[word:kukusavap|kukusavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusavap|thusavap]] || [[word:jusavap|jusavap]] || [[word:shusavap|shusavap]] || [[word:kusavap|kusavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusavap|thusavap]] || [[word:jusavap|jusavap]] || [[word:shusavap|shusavap]] || [[word:kusavap|kusavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesavap|thesavap]] || [[word:jesavap|jesavap]] || [[word:shesavap|shesavap]] || [[word:kesavap|kesavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosavap|thothosavap]] || [[word:jojosavap|jojosavap]] || [[word:shoshosavap|shoshosavap]] || [[word:kokosavap|kokosavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosavap|thosavap]] || [[word:josavap|josavap]] || [[word:shosavap|shosavap]] || [[word:kosavap|kosavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosavap|thosavap]] || [[word:josavap|josavap]] || [[word:shosavap|shosavap]] || [[word:kosavap|kosavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsavap|thĂŠsavap]] || [[word:jĂŠsavap|jĂŠsavap]] || [[word:shĂŠsavap|shĂŠsavap]] || [[word:kĂŠsavap|kĂŠsavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasavap|thathasavap]] || [[word:jajasavap|jajasavap]] || [[word:shashasavap|shashasavap]] || [[word:kakasavap|kakasavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasavap|thasavap]] || [[word:jasavap|jasavap]] || [[word:shasavap|shasavap]] || [[word:kasavap|kasavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasavap|thasavap]] || [[word:jasavap|jasavap]] || [[word:shasavap|shasavap]] || [[word:kasavap|kasavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasavap|shasavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasavap|goshasavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasavap|gokishasavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasavapnĂŒ|shasavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasavapnknĂŒ|goshasavapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavapnĂŒ|gokishasavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasavapshĂ«|shasavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasavapnkshĂ«|goshasavapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasavapshĂ«|gokishasavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavapro|shasavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavapnkro|goshasavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavapro|gokishasavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavapmu|shasavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavapnkmu|goshasavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavapmu|gokishasavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasavapsher|shasavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasavapnksher|goshasavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasavapsher|gokishasavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasavapng|shasavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasavapnkng|goshasavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasavapng|gokishasavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasavapya|shasavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasavapnkya|goshasavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasavapya|gokishasavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasavapyam|shasavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasavapnkyam|goshasavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasavapyam|gokishasavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavapnĂŒshĂ«|shasavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasavapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavapnĂŒro|shasavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavapnknĂŒro|goshasavapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavapnĂŒro|gokishasavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavapnĂŒmu|shasavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavapnknĂŒmu|goshasavapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavapnĂŒmu|gokishasavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavapshĂ«nĂŒ|shasavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavapshĂ«ro|shasavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavapnkshĂ«ro|goshasavapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavapshĂ«ro|gokishasavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavapshĂ«mu|shasavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavapnkshĂ«mu|goshasavapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavapshĂ«mu|gokishasavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavapronĂŒ|shasavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavapnkronĂŒ|goshasavapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavapronĂŒ|gokishasavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavaproshĂ«|shasavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavapnkroshĂ«|goshasavapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavaproshĂ«|gokishasavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavapromu|shasavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavapnkromu|goshasavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavapromu|gokishasavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavapmunĂŒ|shasavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavapnkmunĂŒ|goshasavapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavapmunĂŒ|gokishasavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavapmushĂ«|shasavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavapnkmushĂ«|goshasavapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavapmushĂ«|gokishasavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavapmuro|shasavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavapnkmuro|goshasavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavapmuro|gokishasavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
